    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    U

    update() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Updates the game flow based on the current state.
    updateBank(double) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Updates the Sim's bank balance by subtracting a cost.
    updateNeeds(String, double) - Method in class sims.entity.Sim
    Updates a need or salary for this Sim.
    updateTime() - Method in class sims.gameEngine.GameState
    Updates the in-game clock by advancing time.
    Usage: - Section in sims.entity.Sim.setSkill(Map)
     
    Usage: - Section in sims.gameEngine.GameState.endGame()
